ddls:
CREATE TABLE "estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each estimate */,
  "home_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home size selected by the customer */,
  "crew_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew size required for the move */,
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service type chosen by the customer */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who created the estimate */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the estimate was created */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location of the move */,
  "service_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service area within the location */,
  "move_date" TEXT /* Date of the move */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the estimate (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance for long-distance moves */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimates_service_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_area_id") REFERENCES service_areas ("service_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimates_crew_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_size_id") REFERENCES crew_sizes ("crew_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimates_home_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_size_id") REFERENCES home_sizes ("home_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimates_service_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_type_id") REFERENCES service_types ("service_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimates_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimates_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "home_sizes" (
  "home_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each home size */,
  "home_size" INTEGER /* Size of the home (e.g., 0, 1, 2, etc.) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the home size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("home_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_sizes" (
  "crew_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew size */,
  "crew_size" INTEGER /* Number of crew members required */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crew size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_types" (
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service type */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Name of the service type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the service (e.g., local, long-distance, international) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "estimation_details" (
  "estimation_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each estimation detail */,
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the estimate this detail belongs to */,
  "home_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home size */,
  "crew_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew size required */,
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service type chosen */,
  "labor_cost" REAL /* Labor cost for the estimate */,
  "truck_cost" REAL /* Truck cost for the estimate */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost for the estimate */,
  "additional_cost" REAL /* Any additional costs */,
  "discount" REAL /* Any discounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimation_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimation_details_home_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_size_id") REFERENCES home_sizes ("home_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimation_details_estimate_id FOREIGN KEY ("estimate_id") REFERENCES estimates ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimation_details_crew_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_size_id") REFERENCES crew_sizes ("crew_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimation_details_service_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_type_id") REFERENCES service_types ("service_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing entry */,
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service type */,
  "home_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home size */,
  "labor_cost" REAL /* Labor cost for the service type and home size */,
  "truck_cost" REAL /* Truck cost for the service type and home size */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost for the service type and home size */,
  "additional_cost" REAL /* Any additional costs */,
  "discount" REAL /* Any discounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_home_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_size_id") REFERENCES home_sizes ("home_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_service_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_type_id") REFERENCES service_types ("service_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_areas" (
  "service_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service area */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location this service area belongs to */,
  "service_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the service area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pricing entry this version belongs to */,
  "crew_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew size entry this version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date this version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the version change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_crew_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_size_id") REFERENCES crew_sizes ("crew_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_pricing_id FOREIGN KEY ("pricing_id") REFERENCES pricing ("pricing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, estimator, customer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_description" TEXT /* Description of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "estimator_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "estimator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the estimator adding the note */,
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the estimate this note belongs to */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was added */,
  "note_description" TEXT /* Description of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimator_notes_estimate_id FOREIGN KEY ("estimate_id") REFERENCES estimates ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimator_notes_estimator_id FOREIGN KEY ("estimator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "estimator_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "estimator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the estimator assigned to this task */,
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the estimate this task belongs to */,
  "task_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was assigned */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimator_tasks_estimate_id FOREIGN KEY ("estimate_id") REFERENCES estimates ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimator_tasks_estimator_id FOREIGN KEY ("estimator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "estimator_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "estimator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the estimator being evaluated */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was evaluated */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Rating of the performance (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimator_performance_estimator_id FOREIGN KEY ("estimator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "estimator_training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training entry */,
  "estimator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the estimator receiving training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the training was provided */,
  "training_description" TEXT /* Description of the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimator_training_estimator_id FOREIGN KEY ("estimator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
